name: The Back Nine Golf | Princeton, NJ

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue for those who don't have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar and kitchen food service, though outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator play time typically varies, but a standard 18-hole round usually takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf welcomes families and appears to be kid-friendly with appropriate amenities and atmosphere.
